title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...Snow and blowing snow expected. Total snow accumulations up
to 5 inches. Southeast wind gusts up to 30 mph.

* WHERE...Kuskokwim Delta Coast and Nunivak Island and Western Capes.

* WHEN...From noon Saturday to 8 AM AKDT Sunday.

* IMPACTS...Visibilities reduced to one half mile at times due to
blowing snow. Travel could be very difficult.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...A front will approach ...
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed

title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...Snow and blowing snow. Total snow accumulations up to two
inches and southeast wind gusts up to 35 mph.

* WHERE...St Lawrence Island.

* WHEN...From 1 PM Saturday to 4 PM AKDT Sunday.

* IMPACTS...Travel may be impacted. Visibility may drop down to 1/2
mile at times, especially along the immediate coastline.
Slow down and use caution while traveling.
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed

title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...Snow and blowing snow. Total snow accumulations up to 3
inches and southeast wind gusts to 35 mph.

* WHERE...Yukon Delta Coast.

* WHEN...From 1 PM Saturday to midnight AKDT Sunday Night.

* IMPACTS...Travel may be impacted. Visibility may drop down to 1/2
mile at times, especially along the immediate coastline.
Slow down and use caution while traveling.
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed
